findings.description: Multi-factor authentication is not enforced for all users in the tenant.
findings.narrative: This finding represents a critical identity protection gap.
findings.remediation: Configure Conditional Access policy to require MFA for all users.
findings.root_cause: Conditional Access policies do not cover all user groups.
findings.title: MFA Not Enforced for All Users

findings.description: Unified audit logging is not enabled in the tenant.
findings.remediation: Enable unified audit logging in the Security & Compliance Center.
findings.title: Audit Logging Disabled

narratives.executive_summary: The assessed tenant shows significant gaps in identity protection and audit logging.
